productDisplayName: Spykar Men Actif Fit Low Waist Blue Jeans
description: Composition Blue tight Fit jeans made of 98% cotton and 2% spandex with heavy washed and faded look, creasing and ripped detailing, has two insert pockets on the front, two patch pockets on the back with embroidered detailing and zippered insert pocket over the right patch pocket, brand patch appliqued on the waistband at the back, embroidered lettering below the waistband at the back and metal zipper and button closure Fit Low waist, tight fit Wash care Wash and dry separately Wash inside out in mild detergent Do not bleach Dry under shade Take edgy dressing to the next level in these distressed blue tight fit jeans from spykar. The low waisted jeans in blue are perfect for casual outings with friends. Team this pair with grunge tees and leather vests with leather boots for a great rocker look. Model statistics The model wears jeans of length 41.5" Height-6.1'; Waist-31"
